description: STROMDAO is a German energy-sector consulting and software company focused on digital infrastructure for utilities, grid operators, and market communication processes. Its website presents consulting, AI tools, and data/API offerings for the energy industry.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were confirmed on stromdao.com itself; the site markets APIs and integrations but points developers to other domains such as corrently.io, gruenstromindex.de, cernion.de, and corrently.de for actual API products.
